programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Confidential files are leaked by an anonymous hacker, who threatens to release more unless the Navy agrees to renew a contract with a struggling shipbuilding firm. Meanwhile, Gibbs' colleagues begin to notice his attraction to his opposite number Samantha Ryan. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis

programme.desc: Will and Nikki investigate the suspicious death of a child protection officer on the Cheetham estate. programme.desc: Phil's still on edge about Frank being back in the Square. Gita plans a surprise for Sanjay and Guppy. Sarah goes for an interview at Walford Comprehensive

programme.desc: Ricky is overjoyed by Frank's news, but it's gloves off for Sam and Bianca

programme.desc: The death of Sharon and Tracey's Aunt Sylvie soon has them jetting off to Hollywood in search of their real father. Festive special of the comedy from 1993, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson, with guest appearances by George Hamilton, George Wendt and Richard Branson

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Ursula insists the midwives do not become emotionally involved with their patients, but her harsh new approach proves hard to cope with in the face of two devastating cases. A father-to-be is badly injured in an explosion, leaving him unable to work to support his family, and a couple with dwarfism expecting their first child are warned that their child may be stillborn, a situation that leaves Patsy confronted with one of the hardest decisions of her life

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The government plans to close down small hospitals in favour of larger establishments. Dr Turner and Shelagh prepare for an inspection that will decide the fate of Nonnatus House - but the staff is shocked to find Sister Ursula has no intention of helping to save the maternity home. Barbara comes to the aid of a woman from the Chinese community who is struggling to get on with her mother-in-law, and whose baby is seriously ill

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A woman expecting her third child realises she cannot afford to care for her baby, so makes the painful decision to give it away to her wealthy but childless cousin. Shelagh befriends the woman in the next hospital bed and Dr Turner confides in Timothy about his worst fears. Sister Julienne looks for a new recruit to join the midwives, and the community prepares to celebrate the opening of a new park

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: After concluding she needs a new means of transport, Auntie Wainwright sends Tom and Smiler on a mission to collect her new vehicle - but it doesn't quite live up to their expectations. Jean Alexander, Tom Owen and Stephen Lewis star

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest struggles to promote understanding when a group of pagans are suspected of killing one of their own. Crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Martha's romantic weekend on a remote island is cut short when the hotel owner is stabbed to death in his room in what appears to be an attempted robbery. But since the flower beds outside the window are undisturbed, Humphrey is certain that one of the victim's associates played a part in his death. There's just one problem - since the DI had a direct view of the only staircase leading up to the room, he is the alibi for all the suspects. Meanwhile, JP worries about his marriage and seeks relationship advice from Dwayne

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: A man wrongly convicted of burning down a school is released, and seeks Halford's help in tracking down the culprit. Standing meets a woman who claims to be his daughter (played by Dennis Waterman's real-life daughter Hannah) but Lane is not convinced she is telling the truth. Pullman is offered a promotion to head of the Murder Squad. Kevin Whately and Joe Absalom guest star

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: It is agreed that Section D will use American security system Cybershell to avoid security breaches, and Lucas is assigned to protect White House cryptographer Daniella Ortiz as she installs the necessary codes. However, Tariq discovers computers at the Grid have been infiltrated by suspected Russian and Chinese hackers, and it is only a matter of time before they will have access to all the information held by MI5 and the CIA

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Frank continues to make people uncomfortable, particularly Phil and David. Meanwhile, Peggy sacks Steve, bans Frank from the pub and goes on holiday

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Frank makes his presence known in the Queen Vic, while Pat's troubles have moved closer to home. Robbie has a money-making idea and Kathy has a confession to make to Phil

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The pace of Christmas proves too much for Sharon as a few too many slices of chocolate cake sends her off into a dream world where she is the rich member of the family, happily married to rock star husband Chris, while sister Tracey is a downtrodden housewife in a run-down council flat and man-eating neighbour Dorien her dowdy cleaning lady. Festive edition of the comedy from 1994, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph, with a guest appearance by film-maker Michael Winner

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A distant cousin of Fred's who has Down's syndrome is taken in by the Buckles following the death of his protective mother, but Violet struggles to cope and Shelagh is forced to make other arrangements for his care. New recruit Valerie prepares for her first day at Nonnatus House, and Trixie comes to the aid of a pregnant woman who is in urgent need of dental treatment to avoid an infection. The nurses discover what has happened to Sister Mary Cynthia, a revelation that has distressing consequences for Sister Monica Joan

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: While the world anxiously awaits the resolution of the Cuban Missile Crisis, Valerie treats a pregnant Somali woman who has undergone female genital circumcision. The Nonnatus Team arrange for her to go into hospital, but she responds by going into hiding, and the situation is complicated further when it emerges that the woman's younger sister will soon go through the same process. Sister Mary Cynthia's depression is treated with electroconvulsive therapy, which she hopes will restore her faith

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Dr Turner is reunited with a couple whose daughter was born without limbs, and takes them to a specialist unit where she can be fitted for prosthetics. However, while the experience helps the girl's mother to realise that she is not alone, it proves traumatic for the father, who blames his wife for his child's condition. Nurse Crane takes charge of Sister Winifred's driving lessons, and Trixie thinks Christopher is hiding something from her

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Eric Sykes guest stars as absent-minded Doggy, who is disappointed when his stag night fails to live up to his expectations. However, Clegg, Truly, Alvin and Entwistle come up with a solution and soon rectify the situation. With Peter Sallis, Frank Thornton and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After suspicious circumstances surround the death of a local fighter, Father Brown is drawn into the shady world of boxing to try and uncover the truth

programme.title: Death in Paradise

Suspicion falls on his family and fellow players, but all of them have an alibi. JP thinks Dwayne is keeping something from him and wonders how well he knows his friend, and Humphrey dreads Martha's imminent departure from the island

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra takes drastic measures to prevent Jack exacting revenge on the hit-and-run driver who killed his wife. With the team's future under threat, she tries desperately to keep the truth about the incident from shady new recruit DS Karen Hardwick, while working on a 10-year-old murder case to restore the squad's reputation. Amanda Redman and Lynda Bellingham star

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: Ruth is approached by an official council snooper claiming to have witnessed covert activity. She initially dismisses his claims, but on learning the man has applied to MI5 four times and been rejected owing to mental instability, she visits his flat to follow up the lead. However, she becomes embroiled in a dangerous situation linked to the death of a Mafia leader that Dimitri is investigating. Elsewhere, Lucas comes face to face with Harry in a confrontation destined to change Section D for ever

programme.title: Catherine Cookson's Tilly Trotter
programme.desc: Concluding part. Following the destruction of their home by the McGraths, Tilly and her grandmother are forced to live a life of solitude. Tilly and Katie Drew begin working at Sopwith's mine. Despite the hardships of life in the pit, she enjoys feeling like part of the family. Period drama, starring Carli Norris and Sarah Jane Foster

programme.title: A Place to Call Home
programme.desc: Rene suspects he is standing in the way of Sarah's happiness after witnessing a moment of yearning, while Andrew disturbs Anna and Gino's honeymoon bliss. Elsewhere, George makes an announcement

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: The Holby staff bid an emotional farewell to Roxy who decides she's had enough. Fin puts his life in danger to save his daughter from a burning building. Praised for his heroic rescue bid, Fin is soon brought down to earth when a woman he refused to treat at the scene later dies. Away from the hospital, a traumatised Nina appears to be falling for Abs. Prunella Scales and Christopher Timothy guest star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Phil's spell in uniform comes to a triumphant end when he borrows a bike to chase a mugger and recovers £15,000 in cash. The case gets more interesting when the victim admits he's being blackmailed. Heaton reassures terrified prosecution witness Martin Turnbull he will be given protection following threats from Ray Moore, only to discover the villainous ex-cop has subtler ways of intimidating people

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Ricky is upset when he receives divorce papers. Robbie starts washing windscreens to help Carol pay for her TV licence. Pat and Roy go to the Vic for a drink but Frank appears

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Pauline takes on the council, as Roy takes up a fight of his own. Robbie and Tony get inspiration, Sam gives Ricky an ultimatum and Phil attends an antenatal class

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracy and Sharon discover they have been mentioned in an Irish relative's will, but when they arrive on the Emerald Isle they are disappointed to find they have inherited a field. Final episode of the comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Julienne oversees the opening of a family planning clinic at the local community centre, leading mother-of-three Wilma Goddens to start taking the contraceptive pill behind her husband's back. Barbara is distraught when she discovers that her father has accepted a missionary posting in New Guinea for the next three years so will not be able to officiate at her wedding, while Violet suffers terribly with hot flushes, Christopher asks Trixie to meet his daughter, and Delia's heartache may finally be over

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Boxing Day sees heavy snowfall covering the country and the adverse weather causes major disruption across Poplar as roads become blocked and pipes freeze meaning families have to queue outside for water from standpipes. Sister Julienne must inform a family about the death of their loved one and uncovers an uncomfortable truth, while Valerie helps an unmarried couple living in a caravan prepare for their baby, but unforeseen complications knock her confidence in her ability as a midwife. Guest starring Anita Dobson

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A new midwife joins the team as the area is rocked by power cuts and blizzards. The new arrival is delayed by the weather and falls ill as soon as she arrives. However, she is quickly dragged from her sick bed to assist with a difficult birth. Nurse Crane and Dr Turner treat an elderly cancer patient who faces losing her house due to slum clearances, and try to convince Sergeant Woolf to allow her to die at home

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: An innocuous section of woodland soon becomes a legendary site renowned for its ghostly activity, due to the inventive rumours put about by Alvin, Truly and Clegg. Long-running comedy, starring Peter Sallis, Frank Thornton and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A local writer is murdered, leaving Father Brown delving into her novel Lulu and Lucia for clues as to who might have committed such a crime

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part one of two. A man is found murdered on his boat five miles out at sea, with no possible way a killer could have escaped. At first Humphrey turns his attention to the small group he was with the night before he died - but as the investigation deepens, the investigation takes an unexpected turn that requires the team to leave the comfort of their Caribbean island - and go searching for their suspects in London. Kris Marshall stars

programme.title: Frankie Drake Mysteries
programme.desc: Frankie and the team set out to outcon a conman dealing in mythical prime real estate, who has already duped Nora and Mildred. Period crime drama, starring Lauren Lee Smith as the first female private detective in 1920s Toronto

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Sandra's private and professional worlds become intertwined when her mother has a fall that means she needs to go into a care home. Her first choice is revealed to be the scene of a suspicious death a year earlier, leading Jack, Gerry and Brian to go undercover at the home. Drama, guest starring June Whitfield, Sheila Hancock and Gwyneth Strong

programme.title: Spooks
programme.desc: Following Lucas's shocking revelations about his former life and double identity, Harry instructs the team to find him - at any cost. He enlists the help of a former internal affairs specialist to track down the fugitive, who is becoming increasingly desperate to locate the Albany file and flee the country with Maya. When Harry discovers Ruth has been placed in grave danger, he faces a tough decision that culminates in a showdown with Lucas

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The Lynleys are looking forward to becoming parents, but Helen succumbs to temptation and dabbles in her husband's latest case. However, her past involvement with the victim unwittingly puts her in the firing line, with devastating consequences for everyone. Jemma Redgrave and Barbara Flynn guest star, with Nathaniel Parker, Sharon Small and Lesley Vickerage

programme.title: Breakfast
