programme.title: Steve Jobs (2015)
programme.desc: Danny Boyle's biopic of the technology entrepreneur, exploring his life through three pivotal moments over the course of 14 years. Jobs is passionately driven to revolutionise computing technology, but his dreams come at a price, with a devastating impact on both is relationship with his family and his own health. Starring Michael Fassbender, Kate Winslet and Seth Rogen

programme.title: The Chocolate Challenge with the Hairy Bikers
programme.desc: Budding chocolatiers compete for the chance to make their own chocolate bar that will be manufactured and sold by one of the biggest chocolate companies in the world. This time, the contestants are challenged to make a supersize bar and bite-sized pieces with lots of texture, as well as getting to make use of some of the latest chocolate-making gadgets - which do not always work as intended, leading to some unexpected meltdowns. The Hairy Bikers Dave and Si also visit a top-secret sensory laboratory where products are tested for taste

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: Flushed Away (2006)
programme.desc: A pampered pet rodent is flushed down a toilet and ends up in a vast underground rat city in the sewers of London. He is befriended by a quick-witted rat who offers to help him find his way home, but first the hapless pair have to escape the clutches of an evil toad bent on ridding the rodent metropolis of its residents. Animated comedy, with the voices of Hugh Jackman, Kate Winslet, Ian McKellen, Shane Richie, Jean Reno and Bill Nighy

programme.title: The Longest Ride (2015)
programme.desc: A rodeo rider and a college student fall in love, but begin to question whether they have a future together as their dreams lead them in different directions. They form an unexpected friendship with an old man, whose decades-long tale of love provides them with fresh inspiration. Romantic drama based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, starring Britt Robertson, Scott Eastwood and Alan Alda

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee (2006)
programme.desc: A clever girl from a poor neighbourhood finds school frustrating and tries to hide her intelligence from her classmates. When she competes in a spelling competition, she is surprised to win and with the aid of a strict coach, sets out to take part in a national tournament and provide her community with something to rally round. Drama, starring Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb (2014)
programme.desc: Nightwatchman Larry notices that the living exhibits of his museum are behaving strangely. He discovers that the magical artefact that brings them to life is damaged, so he and his friends travel to London's Natural History Museum to find a way to restore it. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Rebel Wilson and Robin Williams in his final film role

programme.title: Finding Your Feet (2017)
programme.desc: A wealthy woman's privileged existence is shattered when she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend. Seeking solace, she turns to her estranged sister, who lives in a London council estate, and finds a new lease of life in joining her community dance class. Comedy, starring Imelda Staunton, Celia Imrie, Timothy Spall and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Midnight Run (1988)
programme.desc: When accountant Jonathan Mardukas skips bail after having been arrested for embezzlement, bounty hunter Jack Walsh is hired to catch the fraudster and return him from New York to Los Angeles. Unfortunately, his task is hindered by the ingenuity of Mardukas and the attentions of pursuing FBI agents and Mafia hitmen. Comedy thriller, starring Robert De Niro, Charles Grodin, Yaphet Kotto, Dennis Farina, John Ashton and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: The Florida Project (2017)
programme.desc: A six-year-old girl roams the grounds of the motel where she lives with her mother, looking for adventure with her small band of friends. Manager Bobby keeps a protective eye on the children, but his affection for them becomes strained as their mischief escalates. Drama, starring Willem Dafoe, Brooklynn Prince and Bria Vinaite

programme.title: Monster Trucks (2016)
programme.desc: A drilling operation unleashes a subterranean creature which feeds on oil. The monster bonds with a monster truck which a local teenager is building from spare parts, and the youngster befriends the beast and helps it to return to its underground home. Fantasy adventure, starring Lucas Till and Jane Levy

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt

programme.title: Now You See Me 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of magicians-turned-criminals is reunited for a comeback performance by a ruthless technology magnate, whose actual goal is to force the team into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist on his behalf. The illusionists realise their only hope of avoiding the law is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to expose the businessman's illegal activities. Crime thriller sequel, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Daniel Radcliffe and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3 (2017)
programme.desc: Following their win at the world championship, the now-separated Bellas (an all-female a cappella singing group) reunite for one last singing competition at an overseas USO tour. However, they face a squad who uses both instruments and voices. Final part of the blockbusting comedy trilogy, starring Anna Kendrick, Rebel Wilson and Brittany Snow

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
programme.desc: When a dark force threatens a vast metropolis, special operatives Valerian and Laureline must race to identify the menace and protect the future of the universe. Luc Besson's epic sci-fi adventure, starring Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne and Clive Owen

programme.title: Tangerine (2015)
programme.desc: Transgender prostitute Sin-Dee Rella returns to her West Hollywood neighbourhood on Christmas Eve following a stint in jail, only to discover that her pimp boyfriend Chester has slept with another woman while she was incarcerated. Despite her trans best friend Alexandra's efforts to calm her down, Sin-Dee is determined to hunt the woman down. Comedy drama shot entirely with iPhones, starring Kitana Kiki Rodriguez, Mya Taylor, Karren Karagulian and James Ransone

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
programme.desc: When a cosmic blunder leaves Earth in the path of an asteroid, it's up to Sid the sloth and pals Manny and Diego to save the day. Animated sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo and Simon Pegg

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of children's author AA Milne, focusing on how his relationship with his son influenced the creation of the Winnie the Pooh stories. The books prove immensely popular in a nation recovering from the trauma of the First World War, but bring the youngster who inspired them uncomfortably into the public eye. Starring Domhnall Gleeson, Margot Robbie and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us (2017)
programme.desc: A London neurosurgeon desperate to attend an operation crosses paths with an American bride determined to get to her wedding. When their chartered flight crashes, they attempt to survive in the wilderness, while fighting their attraction to each other. Romantic adventure, starring Idris Elba, Kate Winslet and Beau Bridges

programme.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel (2014)
programme.desc: An old man tells a journalist the story of his youth as a lobby boy at a hotel in Eastern Europe in the 1930s. He was taken under the wing of the establishment's dashing concierge, and is drawn into his misadventures as he becomes involved in a conflict over a valuable painting. Wes Anderson's comedy drama, starring Ralph Fiennes, Tony Revolori, F Murray Abraham and Jude Law

programme.title: Ted 2 (2015)
programme.desc: The foul-mouthed talking teddy bear is horrified to discover that he counts as property according to the law. He and his human best friend hire a pot-smoking lawyer to help them fight a court case and get Ted legally recognised as a person. Comedy sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg and Amanda Seyfried, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The McQueens try to guess who is blackmailing them. Edward plans to make sure Tony never sees his family again and the tug of love continues between Sienna, Liberty and baby Faith

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Edward comes up with a menacing plan. Meanwhile, Mercedes is excited by the plans to bring Bobby home for New Year's Eve

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina's bratty cousin comes to visit and causes friction by trying to muscle in on her man. Zelda takes refuge in a genie's glass bottle to get away from Hilda for a while

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is accepted by four different colleges, but cannot decide which to attend - a dilemma made worse by Josh, Harvey and Zelda, who all give her conflicting advice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Raj's old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is dismayed when the group spends the Thanksgiving holiday at Mrs Wolowitz's house, but hits it off with Bernadette's father. Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actress Chelsee Healey hosts the first festive dinner party, focusing on a Caribbean Christmas theme, but the pressures of cooking become too much and the one-tiime Waterloo Road star abandons her guests during dessert. However, singer Marcus Collins eventually persuades her to return to the table and enjoy the rest of the night with fellow actress Crissy Rock, actor Nick Pickard and model Jasmine Lennard

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hollyoaks star Nick Pickard (Tony Hutchinson) hosts a festive-themed dinner party, hoping to claim the £1,000 charity prize and win over initially unimpressed model Jasmine Lennard. He tries to get everyone into a festive mood with a Santa's grotto, elf dress code and gourmet cuisine, but the stress of the occasion takes its toll

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actress Crissy Rock hosts the third party from Liverpool, and treats her dining companions to a retro-themed evening. Plus, the surprise arrival of a new guest turns the week on its head. Chrissy hopes her festive celebration will help secure the £1,000 Christmas prize for a charity of her choice

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The next celebrity host is singer and proud Liverpudlian Marcus Collins, who hopes to win the £1,000 Christmas prize for a charity of his choice by preparing a large main course with a unique Scouse flavour, and putting on boy band-style entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Margi Clarke hosts the final dinner party in Liverpool, and treats her guests to a pantomime-themed evening with a visit from a psychic, some practical jokes and a dish entitled Margi's Magic Flying Phoenix. She hopes her festive frenzy will secure her the £1,000 Christmas prize for her chosen charity

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette's friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isn't happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their son's name ithout his input

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Part one of two. Dr Kelso resolves to get rid of a bird that has taken up residence in the hospital, but the Janitor decides to keep it as a secret pet. JD's efforts to have Keith fired fail to go as planned. Guest starring former basketball player Kareem Abdul-Jabbar

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Part two of two. JD and Dr Cox go through the five stages of grief as their favourite patient nears death. Dr Kelso hits Ted with his car, while Carla forces Turk to join her on a series of double dates

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Elena faces being deported, so Joe offers to marry her so she can stay in the country. Mel refuses to take part in the scheme, but when things begin to go wrong she is forced to protect the couple. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe starts to search for another job as he realises Lennox and Ryder are old enough to look after themselves, however Mel does not want him to go and tries to show him how important he is to her and her family. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's seldom-seen father Roger arrives to spend some time with his son, but Charles is sceptical of his true motives. Meanwhile, Holt tests Amy, Terry, Gina and Rosa with a near-impossible brain teaser in exchange for tickets to a Beyonce concert. Guest starring Bradley Whitford (The West Wing)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon's germophobia lands him in detention when flu season hits Medford and he takes extreme measures to remain healthy. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Mary takes a job as church secretary, she finds herself becoming a marriage counsellor to Pastor Jeff. Sheldon and Missy spend their first afternoon at home alone. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Raegan Revord

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette's life becomes complicated when Stuart starts bringing his new girlfriend home. Penny and Leonard talk about starting a family, and Raj further explores the possibility of an arranged marriage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon refuses to tell anyone why he's never mentioned Tam, apparently his childhood best friend, Leonard tries to find out more. Penny and Bernadette invite Raj's fiancee Anu out for dinner so they can find out more about her

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The villagers prepare to celebrate New Year's Eve and say goodbye to 2020, and Yazz and Tom prepare for their midnight wedding

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The competitive nature of Taskmaster bubbles alarmingly to the surface as a simple team task involving a hammock exposes tensions between two of the five comics vying to win

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle enlists Peralta's help in tracking down his son's favourite toy for Christmas, but they find themselves accidentally facing off against a Latvian crime ring as a result. Back at the precinct, the team members get ready for the annual Christmas carol competition against their rivals at the Metropolitan Transit Authority. Mary Lynn Rajskub guest stars

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel, Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood welcome back eight past contestants to compete once more. In this first of two editions, Paul Jagger, Beca Lyne-Pirkis, Selasi Gbormittah and Val Stones face three festive challenges as they compete to win the Christmas Star Baker title

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Tiger King: Murder, Mayhem and Madness, the Address by Her Majesty the Queen about the coronavirus, Keeping up with the Kardashians and news coverage of Prime Minister Boris Johnson's hospitalisation

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Meanwhile, Penny realises she must deal with a mistake from her past when she and Leonard have an argument. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes under review include James May: Oh Cook, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, Naked Attraction, and news coverage of Dominic Cummings and Donald Trump

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The competitive nature of Taskmaster bubbles alarmingly to the surface as a simple team task involving a hammock exposes tensions between two of the five comics vying to win

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Fred, Gunn and Angel visit Lorne in Las Vegas, only to learn he is being used by a casino owner to steal other people's destinies. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Cordelia appears back in the Hyperion, but appears to have lost her memory, and when Lorne reads her mind he is confronted by a terrifying vision of the future. Supernatural drama, starring Charisma Carpenter

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A wealthy family lose their fortune after being defrauded by their business manager, and move to the small town they bought for their son as a joke birthday gift in 1991

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard becomes concerned that Sheldon will overreact when his friend learns the truth about a past indiscretion, while Penny confronts Raj's old flame Lucy about the way she ended their relationship. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.desc: Sheldon is dismayed when the group spends the Thanksgiving holiday at Mrs Wolowitz's house, but hits it off with Bernadette's father. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Meanwhile, Holt tests Amy, Terry, Gina and Rosa with a near-impossible brain teaser in exchange for tickets to a Beyonce concert. Guest starring Bradley Whitford (The West Wing)

programme.title: We're Going on a Bear Hunt
programme.desc: Animated adventure, based on the popular children's bedtime book by Michael Rosen and Helen Oxenbury. Stan, Katie, Rosie, Max and the baby, along with Rufus the dog, all embark on a quest to find some bears. Trekking through whirling snowstorms, muddy bogs and dark forests, the siblings refuse to let anything get in their way. However, when Rosie and Rufus end up getting lost, bear-hunting suddenly doesn't seem quite so much fun after all. Featuring the voices of Olivia Colman, Pam Ferris and Mark Williams as Mum, Grandma and Dad respectively

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Nick from Crawley, West Sussex, is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Rosie a winter wonderland wedding she will never forget - but has just three weeks to organise the ceremony

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is bothered by the attention he receives in the wake of his heavy element discovery, but is taken aback when his work is disproved by Leonard. Meanwhile, Raj makes Howard and Bernadette feel inadequate when he stays with them for a week and is the perfect house guest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets the opportunity to spend time with Bill Gates at work, because his business wants to partner with her pharmaceutical company. Leonard, Howard and Raj do everything in their power to also meet the high-tech entrepreneur, while Sheldon thinks he's the victim of an April Fool's Day prank

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard runs against Sheldon to be president of the tenants' association, while Bernadette encourages Howard and Raj to track down the owner of a drone they find in the back garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rav Wilding is first to host a round of festive celebrity meals, entertaining Rebecca Adlington, Jennifer Ellison, Alex Carter and Mrs Moneypenny

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The celebrity competitors gather for the second party of the week, hosted by Olympic swimmer Rebecca Adlington, who opts for a Winter Games-themed evening

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stage and screen actress Jennifer Ellison hosts the third dinner party, and hopes an evening of 'restaurant quality' and a singing waiter will be enough to impress her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former Hollyoaks and Emmerdale actor Alex Carter plans an Indian-themed curry menu for the fourth festive dinner party, but his choice of dishes meets a mixed reception

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: SuperScrimpers' own Mrs Moneypenny hosts the fifth and final party of the contest, choosing a traditional Christmas set-up, complete with venison on the menu

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel, Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood welcome back eight past contestants to compete once more. In this first of two editions, Paul Jagger, Beca Lyne-Pirkis, Selasi Gbormittah and Val Stones face three festive challenges as they compete to win the Christmas Star Baker title

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is put in charge of Captain Holt's security after he receives several death threats - a responsibility he not only enjoys, but also abuses as much as he can. Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the first of two special Christmas baking contests. Contestants from past series will be taking part in the first set of festive challenges, under the watchful eye of judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood. The bakers are Tom and Yan from the 2017 series and Briony and Terry from 2018, and there is also a guest appearance by veteran rock band Status Quo, performing their classic hit Rockin' All Over the World

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2010)
programme.desc: A clumsy Viking boy longs to become a mighty dragon slayer and protect his village from the fearsome flying lizards, but his father thinks he is not up to the task. However, when he sets out to prove his worth, he ends up befriending a dragon, and realises his people may have misjudged the creatures. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jay Baruchel and Gerard Butler

programme.title: The Snowman
programme.desc: Raymond Briggs' festive favourite, a wordless animated fantasy telling the story of a small boy whose snowman magically comes to life and whisks him off on the journey of a lifetime to the North Pole. Howard Blake's score includes the award-winning song Walking in the Air, which was taken to number five in the charts by a young Aled Jones, but is here sung by Peter Auty

programme.title: The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: Animated sequel to Raymond Briggs' classic festive tale The Snowman, telling the story of another youngster's magical Christmas. A boy's snowman and snowdog come to life at the stroke of midnight and take him on an adventure to the North Pole, where he and his new companions meet an assortment of colourful characters, including Santa himself, before returning home - where a wonderful surprise awaits

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics give their instant reactions to the biggest and best shows shown over Christmas 2019, including including Gavin and Stacey, Dracula, Strictly Come Dancing, Jamie's Easy Christmas Countdown, Celebrity Catchphrase: Christmas Special, Home Alone, Top Gear Christmas Special, A Berry Royal Christmas, A Merry Tudor Christmas with Lucy Worsley, The Chase Celebrity Christmas Special, Jane and Friends: New Year's Eve Special and Gremlins

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Kelly Osbourne and her friend Sammy Barratt-Singh, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Laurence and Emilia Fox, Nicole Appleton and Mel Blatt, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, Little Mix, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Eamonn Holmes and Ruth Langsford, Martin and Roman Kemp, Rachel Riley and Pasha Kovalev, Jamie and Rebekah Vardy, and Jessie J and Jamal Edwards become TV critics. Shows under their scrutiny include Countdown, Love Island, Antiques Roadshow, Naked Attraction, It, My Gay Dog And Other Animals, and Killing Eve. From June 2019

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. Six-foot pansexual opera singer Clare is looking for a man as tall as she is, while Jessica, who has a disastrous dating history, hopes to bring out her naughty side

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes an important decision after Leonard tries to help her in the aftermath of a failed role on a TV show. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart practise talking to strangers at a shopping centre, and Sheldon studies to become a comic genius. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo try to get to the bottom of a twisted mystery when aliens transport them into a familiar but alternate reality created in a huge simulation chamber on board their spaceship. An oblivious Jerry is accidentally included in the experiment but fails to notice the subtle changes in his surroundings as he makes a big advertising pitch at work. An episode inspired by the twist-filled films of M Night Shyamalan, guest starring David Cross (Arrested Development)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: An epic special featuring every holiday that ever existed, including Mother's Day for Disney characters. Meanwhile, Santa Claus has big problems with the neighbours

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: A festive instalment in which Santa nearly misses Christmas, Kano from Mortal Kombat shares the holidays with Mrs Cage, and Justin Bieber's new song sets out to be a Christmas hit. Plus, the Robot Chicken writers give GI Joe a special Christmas

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Complications ensue when Rick is forced to make good on his promise that Morty can have a new companion - his very own flying, fire-breathing dragon. Meanwhile, Jerry falls under the influence of a mysterious talking cat

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Some of Moira's lawn signs begin to disappear, and David and Alexis work to get David's boss out of trouble. Sitcom, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is bothered by the attention he receives in the wake of his heavy element discovery, but is taken aback when his work is disproved by Leonard. Meanwhile, Raj makes Howard and Bernadette feel inadequate when he stays with them for a week and is the perfect house guest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars

programme.title: Father Christmas
programme.desc: Festive animation based on the book by Raymond Briggs, focusing on Santa's leisurely life on the other 364 days of the year, before he sets off for his annual gift-giving sleigh ride. With the voice of Mel Smith

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a festive edition of the show in which grooms take sole charge of organising their weddings, snowboarding fanatic Darren hopes to impress bride-to-be Bronte and her family by arranging a ceremony in the Swiss Alps. With only three weeks' preparation time and a budget of £12,000, the pressure is on as Darren tries to give his fiancee the Christmas present of her dreams

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes an important decision after Leonard tries to help her in the aftermath of a failed role on a TV show. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart practise talking to strangers at a shopping centre, and Sheldon studies to become a comic genius. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to relax after he is forced to take a holiday, and when Penny quits her job the duo end up spending time together. Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Dr Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere, so Leonard, Raj and Howard go along for the trip. Penny and Bernadette improvise when Amy doesn't like the tame bachelorette party they have planned for her. Peter MacNicol guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon isn't pleased by the newfound popularity of Stuart's comic book shop when an author puts the place on the map. When Raj attempts to take the credit for Penny's astronomical discovery, friendships are tested. Howard and Bernadette try to arrange a date night

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charity fundraiser Rachel Speight-McGregor kicks off a week of festive dinner parties in York. She hopes a full-on evening's entertainment, including carol singers on arrival, will impress her guests - baristar Harry Baines, pub landlady Estella Nicholson, administrative assistant Nicola Gregory and junior doctor Gyles Morrison - and see her on her way to securing the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Junior doctor Gyles Morrison serves a uniquely Caribbean take on a traditional Christmas dinner. Administrative assistant Nicola Gregory is captivated by his charm and keen to demonstrate her affection for the laid-back medic, but the other guests are less enamoured by their host as the dinner party challenge continues in York

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the third edition from York, vegetarian host Nicola Gregory hopes to convert four carnivores with her completely meat-free festive menu. However, the discovery by junior doctor Gyles Morrison and pub landlady Estella Nicholson of deer heads mounted in Nicola's garage leads the guests to question her vegan credentials. Meanwhile, charity fundraiser Rachel Speight-McGregor is more interested in drinking shots of salad dressing, and barista Harry Baines is concerned about his gift of a furry festive jock strap

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Harry Baines hosts the fourth festive edition of the competition from York and tries to prove to his fellow diners that his youth does not affect the quality of his cooking. To impress his guests he makes fiery cheesy focaccia, duck in blankets and mince pies

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub landlady Estella Nicholson hosts the last Christmas dinner from York in her own premises, rustling up a menu including festive fishcakes, cheesy elf bakes, drunken lamb, veggie moussaka and sticky toffee pudding. Admin assistant Nicola Gregory is keen to make amends for offending another guest, and after an eventful week, the winner is decided

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: In the second of two yuletide specials, Noel Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood welcome back four past contestants to compete once more, with Benjamina Ebuehi, Rob Billington, Rav Bansal and Sandy Docherty taking on a series of Winter Wonderland-themed challenges in a bid to win the Star Baker title

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon leaves for Texas when his sister goes into labour. While he is away, the rest of the friends decorate for Christmas and reflect on how much he has changed their lives. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy pulls out all the stops as she hosts a traditional Victorian Christmas Eve dinner for the friends. Meanwhile, Raj's father comes to visit, and the guys do their best to free a bird they accidentally let into the university clean room. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host a special celebrity edition featuring the cast of Derry Girls for the second of this year's Christmas specials. Saoirse-Monica Jackson, Nicola Coughlan, Jamie-Lee O'Donnell, Dylan Llewellyn and Siobhan McSweeney will be cooking up some New Year-inspired bakes to impress judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood and be crowned Star Baker. With music from the London Gospel Community Choir

programme.title: The Snowman
programme.desc: Raymond Briggs' festive favourite, a wordless animated fantasy telling the story of a small boy whose snowman magically comes to life and whisks him off on the journey of a lifetime to the North Pole. Howard Blake's score includes the award-winning song Walking in the Air, which was taken to number five in the charts by a young Aled Jones, but is here sung by Peter Auty

programme.title: The Snowman and the Snowdog
programme.desc: Animated sequel to Raymond Briggs' classic festive tale The Snowman, telling the story of another youngster's magical Christmas. A boy's snowman and snowdog come to life at the stroke of midnight and take him on an adventure to the North Pole, where he and his new companions meet an assortment of colourful characters, including Santa himself, before returning home - where a wonderful surprise awaits

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006)
programme.desc: Sid the sloth, Manny the mammoth and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger grimly realise the good life is about to come to an abrupt end as flood waters threaten their homes. However, a vulture suggests they could turn an old giant tree into a boat and make their escape, so the three friends set off in search of it. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo and Denis Leary

programme.title: Jason Bourne (2016)
programme.desc: Former government operative Jason Bourne has been in hiding for 12 years after exposing a sinister CIA operation. However, he once again finds himself being hunted down when a former CIA operative gone rogue acquires top secret information - including details of Bourne's own father's involvement in a clandestine scheme. Action thriller, starring Matt Damon, Tommy Lee Jones, Alicia Vikander and Julia Stiles

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: With his parents recently divorced, privately educated Will has to move to a new area and make friends at the local comprehensive, where he meets Simon, Jay and Neil. First episode of the comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neil's father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Comedy set against the Troubles in early-1990s Northern Ireland. The start of a new school term gets off to a bad start for Erin when she wakes to find her cousin reading her diary. But there is worse to come when Granda Joe announces a bomb has been found on the bridge. Saoirse-Monica Jackson stars

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: Everyone is excited when Sister Michael announces that this year's school trip is to Paris, and Clare and James decide that they want to improve their French. Meanwhile at the Quinn house, Uncle Colm, Granda Joe's extremely boring brother, is visiting and the whole family are losing the will to live

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam brings his old violin back home, and as a special family treat Mum makes him agree to play the instrument for Grandma, who has been invited round for dinner. However, Adam is not at all happy at the prospect as he hasn't played seriously for some 12 years and has always hated playing the violin anyway. An amused Jonny relishes every moment of discomfort as he watches on from the sidelines. Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter and Frances Cuka star in Robert Popper's award-winning comedy

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The boys face going without crumble if they refuse to help assemble a wooden shelf for Mum's old books and folders in a project that has already baffled Dad. Jonny winds Adam up about an important call he is expecting from America, while Jim drives them mad as he keeps letting his dog Wilson do his 'dollops' in the flowerbed in Mum and Dad's drive. Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig and Paul Ritter star in Robert Popper's award-winning comedy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to relax after he is forced to take a holiday, and when Penny quits her job the duo end up spending time together. Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Sheldon decides to hold his own comic-book convention and searches for a suitable star guest for the event. Meanwhile, the girls take tea at a hotel but discover that maturity is over-rated. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Tiny World, The Undoing, This Morning, Good Morning Britain and First Dates. They also comment on the issue of lockdown tiers as reported on BBC News

programme.title: Gogglesprogs
programme.desc: The young TV viewers offer their honest, inimitable and ultimately hilarious take on First Dates, Nature's Weirdest Events and classic movie Dirty Dancing

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes an important decision after Leonard tries to help her in the aftermath of a failed role on a TV show. Meanwhile, Raj and Stuart practise talking to strangers at a shopping centre, and Sheldon studies to become a comic genius. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to relax after he is forced to take a holiday, and when Penny quits her job the duo end up spending time together. Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp teams up with potter Richard Miller to help Ellie and Nick Harrington - who have no practical DIY skills - create plates to complement their 1930s-style dining room in Tunbridge Wells, Kent

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps a couple with a £250,000 budget who have decided to move full time to Northern Costa Blanca, but first they must choose from five possible homes

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a stately home in Somerset, where Simon is convinced he has uncovered a genuine Tudor relic

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien restore eight items, including a pine blanket chest, a pair of battlefield telephones and some gothic church windows

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB launch their chateau business by opening it up for a tea party for the locals, including the mayor. May holds her health and wellbeing retreat using her new yoga studio for the first time

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Ronnie and Dana in rural Essex, who are converting an ancient barn into a stunning new home

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Golf House on the Isle of Wight, where hosts John and Sue Blakemore hope to impress their guests during their stay. Things start off positively with a well-received breakfast, but a suspicious stain in a toilet causes controversy among some of the competitors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to St John's Wood, north-west London, where Nick Tyrie and his friend Layla Amini welcome their guests to the New Inn Pub. One of the proprietors tries to win points by revealing her musical past, but John and Sue Blakemore feel their room is too impersonal, and are underwhelmed by the choices at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Bunkroom hostel in Chester, David Sharrock is determined to prove that hostelling is for everybody - even if his wife Victoria isn't convinced. It's bunkbeds and budget breakfasts for all, as his fellow hosts decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group heads to John Graham's the B&B in Blackpool for the final visit of the week, and an afternoon of tenpin bowling brings out the guests' competitive sides. Later, there is more tension at the dinner table when the host is subjected to aggressive questioning by John and Sue Blakemore

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the guest house owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service that they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winner is announced

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton, Matt Tebbutt and Helen Lawal present tips on how to feed family and friends better, cheaper and faster at Christmas. They test three novel turkey-cooking methods against the clock - including deep-frying a whole bird - and share time-saving tips for preparing parsnips. They explore whether champagne is worth its hefty price tag, investigate whether digestif drinks really do help after a big meal and explore the psychology of why people cannot stop dipping into the chocolate box

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge help Xuxa and Simon, who are keen to transform the Second World War air raid shelter in their garden into a craft room - the only problem is, the space is tiny, so Angel thinks up some creative space-saving solutions. They also get requests to help Lyra and her dad James, who want to make a new chicken coop, and Helena, whose 1960s stereogram record player is no longer spinning

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: New chateau owners Jayne and Steve need to get four en suite themed bedrooms ready for their new B&B business. For the Oriental suite, Jayne goes to visit Angel for help and advice. Plus, a chance to meet Brit Justin and his Aussie wife Annabelle, who are turning their chateau, with its sweeping views of the Pyrenees, into a family home

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Boat enthusiast James Strangeways invites Kevin McCloud to survey progress on the construction of his new home, which his architect nephew Ben Hebblethwaite has designed to be as 'un-houselike' as possible. James has spent the past 35 years travelling the canals and waterways of Britain, and despite never liking houses, has decided now is the time to put down roots on dry land. Ben hoped a home standing on stilts above a marsh in East Sussex, and incorporating ship-like qualities such as a keel-shaped roof, will be enough to satisfy his boat-mad uncle. However, Ben's contractor goes into liquidation a few months into the project, taking £87,000 of the £300,000 budget, and when James decides to make a few tweaks to the design, alarm-bells begin to ring for the young architect

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George Clarke explores hidden architectural gems in Finland, aided by master-craftsman Will Hardie. They begin at a classic Finnish lodge built on the edge of a frozen lake before venturing north into the arctic circle, hoping to catch a glimpse of the Northern Lights. Along the way, they visit collection of 60 tree houses, a mini city of igloos, and a cabin built in two weeks, before taking a husky ride to their final destination - a caravan on skis

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode displays the strength of unconditional love between parents and children. Michelle, who's 34, is rushed to A&E with suspected sepsis. She is accompanied by her mum, her dad and her son Josiah. Cameras also focus on Charley-Ann, 14, who has come to A&E with her mum after getting part of an earring stuck in her ear

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors suspect a blood clot when David, 69, is rushed in with severe leg pain and a pale foot, and vascular specialists are called to assess him for surgery to save his leg. Annie, 90, has been brought in after struggling to breathe at home. Her daughter Francesca and granddaughter Tamara wait by her side in resus, as doctors battle to uncover the cause of shadowing on her lungs

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal allows himself to be led astray by rebellious new arrival Father Damien, and Ted is suspected of being the criminal mastermind behind a scandalous theft. Comedy, with Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Joe Rooney

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George Clarke explores hidden architectural gems in Finland, aided by master-craftsman Will Hardie. They begin at a classic Finnish lodge built on the edge of a frozen lake before venturing north into the arctic circle, hoping to catch a glimpse of the Northern Lights. Along the way, they visit collection of 60 tree houses, a mini city of igloos, and a cabin built in two weeks, before taking a husky ride to their final destination - a caravan on skis

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: In Manchester, George meets a family of five with a Victorian coach house that's more 1960s than 1860s. He also helps a young couple in Hove get to grips with a 16th-century gate house with a kitchen-diner that resembles a Tudor banqueting hall

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Steve and Cindy Head first visited south Tenerife 20 years ago and the welcoming climate has kept them coming back ever since. Now, after years of dreaming, they are looking for their own holiday home to share with their family. Ben Hillman shows the pair five apartments within their budget of £120,000, but will any of them be up to scratch?

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits Israel to find out about the mystery ingredient that makes icing sugar so light, fluffy and powdery, while Jimmy Doherty is in Italy to investigate the difference between risotto and long-grain types of rice. Matt Tebbutt discovers that one sandwich maker has come up with an innovative - and surprising - way of putting waste bread to good use

programme.title: Anna and the King (1999)
programme.desc: A widowed schoolmistress leaves Victorian England to tutor a son of the King of Siam, only to discover his majesty actually expects her to care for all 58 of his children. In spite of disagreements and many ups and downs, the teacher gradually forms a deep platonic love for her royal employer. Period drama, starring Jodie Foster, Chow Yun-Fat, Ling Bai, Syed Alwi, Tom Felton and Randall Duk Kim

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Ye Olde Fighting Cocks in Arnside, Cumbria, where owners Tony Keates and Jeanette Hamer hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, while the B&B's guests are bowled over by the spectacular views, they are less than impressed by Tony's tales of business success and a mouldy mattress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Hadleigh, Suffolk, where Dr Stephen Stanley-Little invites fellow B&B owners to come and stay at his tranquil country setting - Westward Cottage. He takes his guests on a historic village tour that leaves one couple plotting their escape, while the host's relaxed approach to breakfast drives some of the others mad

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host are bohemian couple Avril Berry and Alan Fraser of Roulotte Retreat in Melrose in the Scottish Borders. Their unique gypsy caravans are not to everyone's liking, and a yoga class fails to calm the tensions that seem to be rising within the group

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Elgin Hotel, Blackpool, where manager Garry Lloyd and his daughter Sophie Seddon want to demonstrate how their 89-room business can still deliver a personal touch. The hosts arrange an afternoon of tap-dancing lessons, ending with a surprise performance at the iconic Grand Theatre, but a breakfast mix-up the following morning puts some of the guests nonplussed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Part one of two. Denise Van Outen presents a countdown of the nation's favourite 100 musicals of all time, as voted for by the British public. The nominations feature a selection of classic and contemporary films, including Moulin Rouge with Ewan McGregor and Nicole Kidman, the ever-popular The Sound of Music, which starred Julie Andrews and Christopher Plummer, and rapper Marshall 'Eminem' Mathers' cinematic debut 8 Mile. Featuring interviews with Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show)

programme.title: The Man Who Invented Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: It's 1843, and struggling with debt after penning three novels which found little favour with the public, Charles Dickens needs a commercial hit to support his family. So he begins work on a new book entitled A Christmas Carol. Comedy drama, starring Dan Stevens, Christopher Plummer and Jonathan Pryce

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: This festive episode from 1996 finds the Craggy Island clerics and six other priests lost in what seems to be the world's largest lingerie department, with only Ted's quick thinking preventing the Catholic Church being rocked by a major scandal. His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Bishop Brennan descends on Craggy Island to investigate rumours that Father Jack has developed the unfortunate habit of sleepwalking in the nude - only to come face to face with his worst fear. Clerical comedy, with Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Clare Grogan guest stars as a feminist protest singer who visits Craggy Island and talks gormless Dougal into giving her the parochial house while Ted is out judging a local beauty contest. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priest makes a valiant effort to give up cigarettes for Lent, inspired by a challenge from Dick Byrne, his opposite number over on Rugged Island, but soon finds he is not cut out for a life of self-denial. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words and numbers quiz, with Jon Richardson and Catherine Tate teaming up against Sean Lock and Joe Wilkinson. Joe Lycett joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, and Rachel Riley is in charge of the numbers

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show's version of the popular and long-running words-and-numbers quiz. Regular team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson are joined by guests Johnny Vegas and Katherine Ryan to provide more comic innuendos, festive surprises and laughs aplenty. Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent takes her usual place in Dictionary Corner with David O'Doherty, while mathematics whizz Rachel Riley is on hand to provide the letters and numbers

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: This festive episode from 1996 finds the Craggy Island clerics and six other priests lost in what seems to be the world's largest lingerie department, with only Ted's quick thinking preventing the Catholic Church being rocked by a major scandal. His bravery earns him the coveted Golden Cleric award, which is when his troubles really begin. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon and Frank Kelly

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are expensive, while Jimmy Doherty investigates why so many cockles in UK supermarkets come from abroad when he always thought of them as a quintessentially British staple. Kate Quilton takes a trip around Europe's largest marshmallow factory to find out why the sticky treat goes crispy and melty at the same time over the campfire

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: David Tomlinson and Andrea Metcalfe from Essex have fallen in love with Spain over the past 10 years and have now decided that the Costa de la Luz is the perfect place to buy a property. With a budget of £110,000, Laura Hamilton shows them five fantastic properties around their favourite city of Jerez

programme.title: White Christmas (1954)
programme.desc: A pair of former soldiers start a new career as nightclub entertainers. They try to boost the popularity of their old commanding officer's struggling winter resort in Vermont by staging a series of extravagant shows, with a little help from their former army buddies and a talented singing sister act. Musical, starring Bing Crosby, Danny Kaye, Vera-Ellen, Dean Jagger, Sig Rumann, Mary Wickes, Anne Whitfield and Rosemary Clooney, featuring seasonal songs by Irving Berlin

programme.title: A Christmas Carol (1984)
programme.desc: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is given a Christmas Eve to remember when a quartet of ghosts - his dead business partner and the spirits of Christmases past, present and future - turn up determined to cure him of his money-grubbing ways. Adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic, starring George C Scott, Nigel Davenport, Frank Finlay, Angela Pleasence, David Warner, Edward Woodward and Susannah York

programme.title: The 100 Greatest Musicals
programme.desc: Denise Van Outen concludes the rundown of viewers' favourite musicals, counting down from 50 to number one. Featuring interviews with stars including Scott Baio (Bugsy Malone), Lee Curreri (Fame), Ron Moody (Oliver!) and Susan Sarandon (The Rocky Horror Picture Show), as well as directors, writers and producers including Randal Kleiser (Grease), Rob Marshall (Chicago), Alan Parker (Evita, Fame and Bugsy Malone) and Cameron Mackintosh and Willy Russell (Blood Brothers). Plus, Omar Sharif, Elaine Paige, Michael Ball, Claire Sweeney, Jonathan Wilkes and Miss Piggy are among the contributors who reveal the impact these musicals have had on their lives

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger

programme.title: Secret History
programme.desc: Dubbed 'The Beast' by Winston Churchill, Tirpitz was Nazi Germany's most powerful battleship. Protected by an elite squadron of fighters, it was seen as invincible, but after 34 failed attempts to sink it, the RAF sent in the 617 'Dambusters' Squadron and 9 Squadron. In a raid in November 1944 they managed to slip through enemy defences and destroy Tirpitz. With eyewitness accounts from surviving RAF crew, one of the Luftwaffe fighter pilots and German sailors, this documentary tells this extraordinary story and offers new evidence to explain the mission's improbable success

programme.title: The Great Train Robbery: The Hidden Tapes
programme.desc: With access to tapes that have been hidden for over 40 years, this documentary goes behind the legend of the 1963 heist to uncover the true story of the crime of the century. Through tape recordings made by one of the key masterminds, the film explores the truth about the background to the robbery, and the audacious planning to carry it off, as well as revealing how one of the men managed to escape the police and live off his share of the loot until he died a few years ago

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms
programme.desc: Part one of two. Tamsin Greig narrates this countdown of the shows that have made millions laugh over the past 50 years. From recent series like The Office, Twenty Twelve, Mrs Brown's Boys and Peep Show, to old classics such as The Likely Lads, Dad's Army and Steptoe and Son, which one will come out on top in a UK poll? The programme features interviews with genre favourites, including Brendan O'Carroll, Richard Wilson, Tony Robinson, Ricky Tomlinson and Wendy Craig

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Sitcoms
programme.desc: Part two of two. Tamsin Greig continues this countdown of the shows that have made millions laugh over the past 50 years. From recent series like The Office and Peep Show, to older classics such as Fawlty Towers, Only Fools and Horses and Blackadder, which one will come out on top in a UK poll? The programme features interviews with genre favourites, including Wendy Craig, Patricia Routledge, Leslie Ash and Alison Steadman, as well as writers and producers

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts this festive edition of the comedy panel show's twist of the words and numbers quiz, with actress Kathy Burke and comedian Russell Howard joining team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson. Joe Lycett joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Joe Wilkinson 'assists' maths whizz Rachel Riley at the numbers board

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team investigates fast food, with Matt Tebbutt delving into the world of KFC, Kate Quilton going behind the scenes at Deliveroo and Helen Lawal heading to Papa John's to see how they achieve consistency on a mass scale. Jimmy Doherty travels to New York to discover the surprising health benefits of the taco and Matt discovers the concealed contents lurking in cheap takeaways

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates craft beer, meeting a couple who gave up jobs in the NHS to pursue their dream lifestyle of brewing and selling ale. Kate Quilton goes in search of the perfect tomato and finds herself in the middle of the world's biggest food fight at a festival in Valencia, and Matt Tebbutt examines why tinned anchovies taste salty when fresh ones don't, visiting a processing plant to find out

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie visits the Garden State for supersized breakfast in a New Jersey diner, a tryout with ice hockey pros the NJ Devils - and an epic struggle with an eight-hot-dog challenge

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: In Austin, Eddie Hall takes on Superbike legend Colin 'Texas Tornado' Edwards in a strength vs speed race - and sets his own eating challenge from eight of the city's food trucks

programme.title: Big Zuu's Christmas Eats
programme.desc: Phil Wang, Desiree Burch, Ed Gamble and Rosie Jones return for more of Zuu's delicious eats but not before he takes them on some festive foraging.

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: Intrepid gravity-fuelled Soapbox Racers take on Observatory Hill overlooking Helsinki Harbour. How will they handle the brutal berm, the car wash and the ferocious kickers?

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Ben Fogle and Hugh Dennis undertake a perilous journey through the Peruvian Andes. Their route takes in 2,000ft drops, one-lane dirt roads, remote mountain trails and muddy, humid jungle terrain, as they search for the lost city of Constitucion, once destined to be the capital of Peru

programme.title: Top Gear: Top Fails
programme.desc: A look back at all that Top Gear has tried and failed to accomplish, including spectacular fails, mixing shorter, one-off catastrophes with longer, more developed failures

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May travel to America for an interstate road trip, completing various challenges along the way. Starting in Miami, they each buy a car for less than $1,000 and drive to New Orleans, where they set out to give their vehicles away to people who suffered in Hurricane Katrina

programme.title: Top Gear Best of British
programme.desc: The team present a special selection of items from the vaults celebrating the best of British, highlights include a toppling Reliant

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Festive edition from 2008 in which Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on one of the most spectacular road trips they have ever attempted. Arriving in Vietnam, they are challenged to travel the entire length of the country in just eight days. First they must buy suitable transport for the journey, and despite having several million Dong in their pockets, this proves more difficult than they expected, especially in one of the most expensive car markets in the world

programme.title: Top Gear Best of British
programme.desc: The team present a special selection of items from the vaults celebrating the best of British, featuring a spectacular, tear-jerking line-up of British-made metal on The Mall

programme.title: Red Bull Soapbox Race
programme.desc: The teams take on one of the steepest courses in Red Bull Soapbox Race history in Lithuania. Will the soapboxes cope with the water jump and savage bone-rattler?

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Crystal Maze presenter Richard Ayoade returns with the offbeat tourism show and is joined in the first edition by comedian and Room 101 host Frank Skinner for a short break in Switzerland's largest city. Their two-day break in Zurich features trips to a football museum and the Cabaret Voltaire, which was the birthplace of the Dada art movement, while they also go on the steepest funicular railway in the world, pay homage to the Swiss army knife and go for a pedalo ride on Lake Zurich

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by writer and actor Jessica Knappett for his latest trip, touring the island in a silver Citroen 2CV, discovering there is more to Ibiza than foam parties, and visiting the Unesco world heritage site of Dalt Vila in the capital. They also take in al fresco art at the island's version of Stonehenge, experience an exclusive supper club run by the global superstar chef Boris Buono and sample a selection of pricy cocktails, flowriding and a hippy gong bath

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by actress and comedian Morgana Robinson for a two-day break in the Italian city of Milan, taking in art, pasta, the bowling game of bocce, and a drink in Backdoor 43 - a tiny bar that can hold a maximum of four customers at a time. At a viewing of Leonardo da Vinci's The Last Supper, Richard finds the painting to be quite good, but Morgana thinks it's 'no Tracey Emin'. The pair also take in the city's epic cathedral and drop in on a pasta-making lesson that proves strangely musical
