programme.title: Ryder Cup Golf
programme.desc: The first action from the 39th staging of the biennial contest between teams from the USA and Europe, featuring the foursomes matches at the Medinah Country Club in Illinois, with four points up for grabs. The Americans won the opening session by a point two years ago at the Celtic Manor Resort in Newport, with only the pairing of Lee Westwood and Martin Kaymer claiming a win for Europe

programme.title: Ryder Cup Golf
programme.desc: Highlights of the second session on day one from the Medinah Country Club in Illinois, featuring the opening fourballs matches. Stewart Cink and Matt Kuchar's victory over Graeme McDowell and Rory McIlroy two years ago in Wales ensured USA held a two-point lead over Europe at the end of the rain-affected second session, but it was the Europeans who went on to win the prestigious title

programme.title: Ryder Cup Golf
programme.desc: Highlights of the foursomes as the second day's play got under way at the Medinah Country Club in Illinois, with the USA and Europe battling for supremacy. Four matches were scheduled to take place in a session that could ultimately prove crucial, with little to choose between the squads selected by captains Davis Love III and Jose Maria Olazabal

programme.title: Ryder Cup Golf
programme.desc: Highlights of the foursomes as the second day's play got under way at the Medinah Country Club in Illinois, with the USA and Europe battling for supremacy. Four matches were scheduled to take place in a session that could ultimately prove crucial, with little to choose between the squads selected by captains Davis Love III and Jose Maria Olazabal

programme.title: Ryder Cup Golf
programme.desc: Action from the 12 singles matches on day three at the Medinah Country Club in Illinois, where the USA and Europe concluded their battle for supremacy. America had dominated the opening two days of foursomes and fourballs matches as they aimed to regain the title, leaving Europe needing an outstanding performance in the singles if they were to have any hope of a fightback

programme.title: Perfection In Paris
programme.desc: A look back at the 2018 Ryder Cup, when Europe and the USA met at Le Golf National in Paris

programme.title: Ryder Cup Golf
programme.desc: Watch along with some of the European players as they look back at coverage of the final, history-making day as Europe and the USA duelled for the Ryder Cup in 2012

programme.title: How the Ryder Cup Was Won
programme.desc: A look back at the 39th staging of the event, which took place between the USA and Europe at the Medinah Country Club in Illinois

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Jose Maria Olazabal shares his memories of the 2012 Ryder Cup at Medinah, where he captained the European team to victory in a stunning comeback

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Davis Love III shares his memories of The 2016 Ryder Cup at Hazeltine National Golf Club, at which he captained the American team to their first victory since 2008

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Martin Kaymer shares his memories of the 2012 Ryder Cup at Medinah

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Justin Rose shares his memories of the remarkable 2012 Ryder Cup at Medinah, in which the European team completed one of the sport's great comebacks to take victory

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Luke Donald shares his memories of the remarkable 2012 Ryder Cup in Medinah, where the European team made a staggering comeback to win on the final day. The Americans went into the final day with a 10-6 lead, needing just 4.5 points from the 12 singles matches to win, but the Europeans won eight and tied one of the 12 singles matches to claim a famous 14.5-13.5 victory

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: New Orleans Saints v Minnesota Vikings (Kick-off 9.30pm). Coverage of the NFC match from Mercedes-Benz Superdome. The home side have put together another winning season so far, despite the absence of talismanic quarterback Drew Brees in recent weeks after he suffered five broken ribs and a collapsed lung, and will be looking for victory here to strengthen their play-off hopes. The Vikings have been inconsistent for much of this campaign, but will hope to progress to the post-season courtesy of a wild card berth
